popularStory.headline: Captain Robert Andrews
popularStory.description:
ROBERT ANDREWES came from England, and settled at Ipswich, early in the year 1635.
The Andrews Memorial states: that Capt. Andrews, came
from Norwich, Norfolk County. England, early in 1635, as owner …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Andrews於1630年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼時，他的父親Francis William Henry Andrews22歲，母親Mary Street Goare21歲。他於1608年7月13日與Elizabeth of Ipswich在英國英格蘭維爾爾哈澤爾波利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其被列為innkeeper of ipswich。他去世於1676年5月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼陶頓享年46歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼陶頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Andrews于1630年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼时，他的父亲Francis William Henry Andrews22岁，母亲Mary Street Goare21岁。他于1608年7月13日与Elizabeth of Ipswich在英国英格兰維爾爾哈澤爾波利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其被列为innkeeper of ipswich。他去世于1676年5月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼陶頓享年46岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼陶頓。

nameMeanings.name: Andrews
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Andrew , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This is the usual southern English patronymic form, also found in Wales; the Scottish and northern English form is Anderson . In North America, this surname has absorbed various cognates from other languages, e.g. Polish Andrzejewski , Slovenian Andrejčič, Serbian and Croatian Andrić (see Andric ), and Czech Ondráček (see Ondracek ).
Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Scottish Gaelic Mac Aindreis or Irish Mac Aindriú, see McAndrew .

History: This was a common name among the early settlers in New England. Robert Andrews emigrated in 1635 from Norwich, England, to Ipswich, MA. Even before 1635, one Thomas Andrews is recorded as being established in Hingham. A certain William Andrews was a member of John Davenport's company, which sailed from Boston in 1638 to found the New Haven colony.

variants.name: Andrus
meanings: History: William Andrus came to Boston in 1635 and moved to New Haven in 1639, where he died in 1676.

variants.name: Andrew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the usual vernacular English form (recorded from the 13th century onward) of the New Testament Greek personal name Andreas . In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech Ondřej (see Ondrey ) and Albanian Ndreu , and also their patronymics and other derivatives (see examples at Andrews ).
History: The surname Andrew was first brought to North America from England by Robert Andrew (died 1668), who settled in Boxford, MA.

variants.name: Andros
meanings: English: variant of   Andrews  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

American shortened form of Greek Andronikos (see Andron 2) or of any other surname based on a personal name beginning with Andr- (from andros, genitive of anēr ‘man, male’), e.g. Androutsos, including their patronymics and other derivatives, such as Andronikidis.

History: William Andros came to VA in 1617 and died there c. 1655. Sir Edmund Andros (1637–1714) was the British colonial governor of several provinces in America between 1674 and 1698, most notably NY (1674–81).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Andrews was born in 1630, in Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Francis William Henry Andrews, was 22 and his mother, Mary Street Goare, was 21. He married Elizabeth of Ipswich on 13 July 1608, in Hazelbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. His occupation is listed as innkeeper of ipswich in Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. He died in May 1676, in Taunton, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 46, and was buried in Taunton, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Andrews est né en 1630, à Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Francis William Henry Andrews, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Mary Street Goare, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth of Ipswich le 13 juillet 1608, à Hazelbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est innkeeper of ipswich à Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Il est décédé en mai 1676, à Taunton, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Taunton, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Andrews 1630 in Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Francis William Henry Andrews 22 und seine Mutter Mary Street Goare 21. Er hat am 13. Juli 1608 in Hazelbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth of Ipswich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als innkeeper of ipswich in Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America aufgeführt. Er starb im Mai 1676 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Taunton, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Taunton, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Andrews è nato il nel 1630 nel Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Francis William Henry Andrews, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Mary Street Goare, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth of Ipswich il 13 luglio 1608, nel Hazelbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come innkeeper of ipswich nel Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Morì nel maggio 1676, nel Taunton, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Taunton, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Andrewsが1630年にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーで生まれた時，父Francis William Henry Andrewsは22歳，母Mary Street Goareは21歳であった。1608年7月13日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアヘイズエルブリーでElizabeth of Ipswichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスイプスウィチでの職業はinnkeeper of ipswichと記録されている。彼は1676年5月にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニータウントンで46歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニータウントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Andrews(이)가 1630년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Francis William Henry Andrews(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Street Goare(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1608년 7월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 하즈버이에서 Elizabeth of Ipswich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 이프스위치에서 innkeeper of ipswich이었다. 그는 1676년 5월 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 타운턴에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 타운턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Andrews nasceu em 1630, em Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Francis William Henry Andrews, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Mary Street Goare, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth of Ipswich em 13 de julho de 1608, em Hazelbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como innkeeper of ipswich em Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Ele faleceu em maio de 1676, em Taunton, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Taunton, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Andrews родился в 1630 г. в местности плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Francis William Henry Andrews было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Street Goare, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth of Ipswich 13 июля 1608 г. в местности хезелбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери.  Он работал по профессии innkeeper of ipswich в местности ипсвич, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он умер май 1676 г. в местности таунтон, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности таунтон, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Andrews nació en 1630, en Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Francis William Henry Andrews, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Mary Street Goare, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Elizabeth of Ipswich el 13 de julio de 1608, en Hazelbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era innkeeper of ipswich en Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Murió en mayo de 1676, en Taunton, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Taunton, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.
